title: acer opalus subsp. opalus
intro: Acer opalus subsp. opalus, also known as the Italian maple or field maple, is a subspecies of maple tree native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Acer opalus subsp. opalus include its ability to act as an astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from digestive problems, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Acer opalus subsp. opalus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
